Statement 1 is correct because the International Seabed Authority (ISA), established under the UN Convention on the Law of the Sea, is responsible for regulating seabed exploration and mining in international waters. Statement 2 is correct as India, through its Ministry of Earth Sciences, has indeed received exploration licenses for polymetallic nodules in the Indian Ocean. Statement 3 is correct as rare earth elements are known to be present in polymetallic nodules and crusts found on the seafloor in international waters.
